title: Purple GUI
body:
# Purple GUI
No, this is not intended for pvp, it is more like a general-purpose GUI resource pack. 

# Add-ons!
Check out my pack [Purple Icons!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/purple-icons) It kinda works as an add-on for this pack.

Also there is a **"Purple Modded GUI"** pack, just click on the version of the pack that you are/will be using and scroll down, there should be a "Purple Modded GUI" file to download, then put it on top of the main pack in the resource pack screen.


### Mods supported:
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [ItemSwapper](https://modrinth.com/plugin/itemswapper)
- [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [RP Renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames)

# Hotbar Preview
![HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CghMkzlW/images/877908f52da3642ff9a96f92a60e868df333528a.png)

## Hotbar Preview with [Purple Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/purple-icons)
![HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CghMkzlW/images/b930af00d2c4c9c6a867314d900fe719d914c89c.png)

## Quick Suggestions
I recommend to use it with [Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons) and [this add-on](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons-advertisement-removal) for better immersion.

Also, if you want a shulker inventory preview, I'd recommend to use [Inspecio](https://modrinth.com/mod/Inspecio) so the tooltip uses the pack's inventory. It also has lots of other QoL tooltips c:

##### ~~No, I will not make a dark version of this pack.~~ Maybe.
